question.label: Self-read opener
question.name: Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?
question.description: Anchors the conversation in their self-assessment first; gap vs manager's view becomes a signal.

answer: I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.

assessment.note: He can identify wins but explicitly says he is unsure whether they meet the team bar, which is a strong clarity gap with mild engagement still present.

new_queue.label: Thread follow
new_queue.name: name wins, always — can you say more about what that means for you right now?

new_queue.label: Team bar mismatch
new_queue.name: When your wins miss the team bar, what tends to be off?

new_queue.label: Concrete examples
new_queue.name: Which recent piece of work best shows your current quality bar?

new_queue.label: Feedback translated
new_queue.name: What changed in your day-to-day after the last round of feedback?

new_queue.label: Quality misses
new_queue.name: Where do you think your work most often misses the bar?

new_queue.label: Working definition
new_queue.name: How do you decide when a design is ready to ship?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would you like to have changed by our next check-in?

history.answer_excerpt: I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
